name: Popular Bank
description_short: Popular Bank is a credit building provider based in New York, New York. Rated 3.4/5 with 22 Google reviews, reflecting mixed customer satisfaction.
description_long:
Popular Bank is a credit building provider serving clients in New York, New York. Carrying a 3.4/5.0 Google rating from 22 reviews, Popular Bank has an mixed reputation among consumers in the New York area looking to build or rebuild their credit history.

Operating as a atm, mortgage lender, Popular Bank provides a range of services for consumers seeking credit building solutions. Additional information about their services and processes can typically be found on their website.

Credit building services like Popular Bank in New York help consumers who are starting fresh or recovering from credit setbacks. The most effective credit building programs report to all three major credit bureaus and provide tools to track progress over time. When comparing providers, look for transparent pricing, no hidden fees, and verified reporting to Equifax, Experian, and TransUnion.

Consumers in the New York, New York area who are considering Popular Bank should contact the company directly to discuss their specific situation and get current pricing information. As with any credit building provider, it is advisable to compare multiple options, verify licensing and credentials, and read recent customer reviews before making a decision.
